sections.title: Le rapport flash désormais en multilingue sur AirSaas
Vos chefs de projets et PO vont adorer
sections.note: Live has the quote in a separate testimonial-styled div; extraction merges it as <em> in body. Acceptable but could have been a testimonial section.

sections.title: Animer une réunion
sections.note: imageSrc is a Lottie .json animation; faithful to live but may not render as image.

audit.summary: Extraction is faithful to the live page. All hero, intro, feature-split, and CTA sections are correctly mapped with proper titles, highlights, body content, and images. The pull-quote in section 2 is rendered inline as <em> rather than as a dedicated testimonial block, but that's a minor structural choice. Section 5's imageSrc references a Lottie .json file (matching live), which may need rendering consideration but is faithful.
